summary: Comprehensive testing of Proper Accounting System completed. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). All 15 navigation tabs working. UI testing verified Chart of Accounts (30 accounts), Voucher Entry (double entry validation), Trial Balance, P&L Statement, and Balance Sheet.
passed_tests: Financial Year - Active FY returns April-March format (2025-26)
Chart of Accounts - Initialize 30 default accounts
Chart of Accounts - Get accounts grouped by 5 types (asset, liability, capital, income, expense)
Chart of Accounts - Create new account with type and sub-type
Chart of Accounts - View account ledger with opening/current balance
Journal Entry - Create balanced payment voucher (Debit = Credit)
Journal Entry - Reject unbalanced entry (Debit != Credit) with 400 error
Journal Entry - Account balances update correctly after voucher
Journal Entry - All 6 voucher types work (payment, receipt, journal, contra, sales, purchase)
Trial Balance - Shows all accounts with Debit and Credit totals
Trial Balance - Total Debit equals Total Credit (is_balanced flag)
P&L Statement - Shows Income vs Expenses with direct/indirect breakdown
P&L Statement - Net Profit/Loss calculation correct
Balance Sheet - Two column format (Liabilities+Capital vs Assets)
Balance Sheet - Assets = Liabilities + Capital equation verified
Opening Balance - Create/update opening balance for account
Integration - Complete accounting workflow verified
Navigation - All 15 tabs working (Dashboard, Staff, Attendance, Salary, Cash Book, Party Ledger, Byaj, Expenses, Reports, Chit Fund, Accounts, Voucher, Trial Balance, P&L, Balance Sheet)
UI - Chart of Accounts shows 30 accounts grouped by type
UI - Add Account modal has all required fields (type, sub-type, name, code, opening balance)
UI - View Ledger modal shows opening balance, current balance, entries
UI - Voucher Entry shows 6 voucher type quick buttons
UI - Voucher form validates Debit = Credit before save
UI - Unbalanced entry shows Hindi warning and disables Save button
UI - Trial Balance shows balance status indicator (green/red)
UI - P&L Statement shows two-column layout (Expenses vs Income)
UI - Balance Sheet shows two-column layout (Liabilities+Capital vs Assets)
critical_code_review_comments: Double entry validation working correctly - rejects if Debit != Credit
All 5 account types implemented: Asset, Liability, Capital, Income, Expense

Sub-types correctly mapped: current_asset, fixed_asset, current_liability, long_term_liability, owners_capital, drawings, retained_earnings, direct_income, indirect_income, direct_expense, indirect_expense
Financial Year correctly set to April-March (Indian standard)
Balance Sheet equation (Assets = Liabilities + Capital) verified
Trial Balance equation (Total Debit = Total Credit) verified
Net Profit correctly added to Capital in Balance Sheet
seed_data_creation: 30 default accounts created via POST /api/accounts/initialize-defaults. Test vouchers created and deleted during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Proper Accounting System fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_proper_accounting.py cover: Financial Year, Chart of Accounts CRUD, Journal Entry (Voucher) with double entry validation, Trial Balance, P&L Statement, Balance Sheet. All 15 navigation tabs verified working. Previous tests in test_byaj_chitfund.py and test_accounting_system.py still valid.
